table.showing: Muujinaya {{from}} ilaa {{to}} ka mid ah {{total}} kontaynar

create.title: Kudar Kontaynar
create.instruction_hint: Qaabka gaarka ah ama qoraallo gaadiid-qaadayaasha
create.instruction_placeholder: tusaale: Jajab, si taxadar leh u qaad...
create.port_required: Dekad ayaa loo baahan yahay Jabuuti
create.at_least_one_cargo: Ugu yaraan hal sharaxaad alaab ayaa loo baahan yahay
create.success: Kontaynarka si guul leh ayaa loo sameeyay
create.error: Kontaynarka lama sameeyn karin. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
create.instruction_full_hint: Bixso tilmaamo gaar ah oo ku saabsan qaadashada ama qoraallo muhiim ah oo ku saabsan waxa ku jira kontaynarka gaadiid-qaadayaasha
create.instruction_example: tusaale: Waxa ku jira kontaynarka waa jajab...

update.title: Wax ka Beddel Kontaynarka
update.success: Kontaynarka si guul leh ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyay
update.error: Kontaynarka lama cusboonaysiin karin. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

view_sheet.available_desc: Kontaynarada aad u meelmarin karto xamuulkan. Dooro mid ama wax ka badan, ka dibna meelmari.
view_sheet.no_match: Kontaynar ku habboon raadintaada ma jiro. Lambar kale isku day.
view_sheet.no_available: Kontaynar la heli karo ma jiro. Samee mid cusub ama raadi kuwa jira.
view_sheet.no_containers: Kontaynar lama helin. Samee mid cusub.
view_sheet.available_count: {{count}} oo la heli karo si loo meelmariyo

document_preview.title: Horfiirinta dukumentiga
document_preview.download_failed: Soo dejintu wuu guuldareystay. Isku day inaad browserka ku furtid.
document_preview.pdf_load_failed: Soo rarida muujiyaha PDF wuu guuldareystay
document_preview.preview_not_available: Horfiirin uma diyaarsana noocaan faylka ah.
document_preview.restricted_hint: Dukumentigu wuu xaddidnaadaa ama waqtigiisii wuu dhacay. Isku day soo dejinta ama browserka ku furista.
